title: blumea velutina
intro: Blumea velutina, also known as Udang udang, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Blumea velutina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Blumea velutina is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can also be found in traditional medicine formulations, such as teas, capsules, and creams.
